text: 9. Single Tasking Only: Focus on one task at a time to avoid overload. 10. No-Phone Zones: Designate areas or times where phones are off-limits, like meals or bedtime. 11 Delay Distractions: Note down distractions and return to them later. 17 Set Focus Modes: Use features like “Do Not Disturb” or focus playlists to stay in the zone. 13 Consume Long Content: Read books, watch full videos, or engage deeply in meaningful media. 14.Set Clear Intentions: Define your goal before starting any task to minimise mindless drifting. 15 Hide Temptations: Make distractions less accessible by using limits or reducing appeal (like grayscale). 11 Break Tasks into Stens: Simbplifv big proiects into smaller actionable tasks
